summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ECOUP recycling app. Backend API tests: 16/16 passed (100%). Frontend UI tests: All core flows working. One design issue found with badge overlay on mobile.

ui_bugs.issue: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps bottom navigation on mobile viewport (390x844), blocking 'Historial' and 'Perfil' tabs

design_issues.screen: All pages with BottomNav on mobile
issues: Badge at y=788 overlaps with bottom nav at y=790.5, making middle nav items unclickable without force=True

action_items: Fix bottom navigation z-index or add padding to avoid badge overlap on mobile (the badge is from Emergent platform, may need to adjust BottomNav positioning)
critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warnings in HomePage.js, HistoryPage.js, RequestDetailPage.js, MapView.js about missing useEffect dependencies - should add dependencies or use useCallback
BottomNav uses fixed positioning with z-50 but badge has higher z-index causing overlap
seed_data_creation: Test requests created during backend testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working correctly with Supabase. Frontend flows (login, logout, navigation, create request) all functional. The badge overlay issue is a platform-level concern that may not be fixable in app code. Use force=True for Playwright clicks on bottom nav items on mobile viewport.
